titleStmt.title: SII 19.454: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 454. MĀRANDAI, TENKASI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE maṇḍapa IN FRONT OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, KAILĀSANĀTHA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This is in Vaṭṭeḻuttu script and records a gift of 10 mā of land tax-free by the sabhā of Māṟandāyanallūr a brahmadēya in Kaḷakkuḍi-nāḍu for offerings and worship in connection with the procession of the god (tiruchchennaḍai) in the temple of Tirunāraṇa-Viṇṇagar-Perumānaḍigaḷ (Nārāyaṇa). The existence of this record in a Śiva temple is very probably due to the use of inscribed stones of a deserted Vishṇu temple in the later construction of this temple for Śiva as recorded in an epigraph of Pāṇḍya Śrīvallabha (A.R. No. 309 of 1918).

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakesarivarmarkku yāṇṭu mu
Ivvāṇṭu kaḷakkuṭināṭṭup piramateya māṟantāyanal
lūr māsabhaiyom Ivvūrt tirunāraṇa viṇṇakarpperu
māṉaṭikaḷukkut tiruccennaṭaikkuk kuṭutta pūmi muṉṟi
kūṟṟukku teṟkum vetiyakkuṭāṉ kuḷattukku kiḻakkum
ṉmāṇikuḷamāyiṉa caṅkaraṉāraṇaṉ Erikku vaṭakku
muḻutumaṭaiya teṟkunokki kālviṭutta virikiṇaṟ
ṭṭa pattumā nilamum Iṟaiyiliyāka kuṭuttom sabhaiyom .
Digital edition of SII 19.454 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
